name: Stratum (all)
description: Any Stratum. Tectonicas is the top one (19M base). Also Paleas, Cucumisis, Frigus, Excutitus, Araneamus, Laminamus, Limaxus.
description_en: Any Stratum. Tectonicas is the top one (19M base). Also Paleas, Cucumisis, Frigus, Excutitus, Araneamus, Laminamus, Limaxus.
description_ru: Любой Stratum. Tectonicas — топ (19M база). Также Paleas, Cucumisis, Frigus, Excutitus, Araneamus, Laminamus, Limaxus.
